title: NamespaceAuditEvent
description: Append-only audit event for namespace lifecycle, metadata, ownership, and validation actions. Persisted in the spec-006 registry-audit container (PK /entityId). Extends the spec-006 AuditEvent shape with new eventType values and a nullable lifecycleReason field.

entityId.description: Foreign key into OnboardedNamespace.id. Partition key path.

eventType.description: Spec-008 event types. The spec-006 audit-event schema additionally permits Created/Updated/Deleted/StatusChanged for Manual-source namespaces; those are NOT emitted for Onboarded namespaces.

changeSummary.description: Single human-readable sentence describing the action.

lifecycleReason.description: Populated only on NamespaceLifecycleTransitioned events. Operator-supplied free-form.

wasForceOverwrite.description: True when the operator explicitly chose Force-overwrite in a concurrency conflict (spec 006 FR-020 pattern reused).
